steps.title: Separate the fixed and extra costs
steps.content: The first 3 hours cost a fixed 880 dollars. If the rental lasts $t$ hours with $t\gt 3$, the number of extra hours is $t-3$.

steps.title: Write the total cost
steps.content: The extra-hour charge is $60(t-3)$, so the total cost is $880+60(t-3)$.

steps.title: Match the equation
steps.content: The total is 1,120 dollars, so the equation is $880+60(t-3)=1{,}120$. That matches Choice C — $880+60(t-3)= 1,120$.
